title: Vendingpreneurs

How should I respond to this?

This is my first "warm" lead from the platinum level process. It was texted to me likeвА¶ day 3 or so of joining the group! Had a great pop in - but this was their response:

Good afternoon,

Sorry for theвА¶continue

Matthew Bacine
5h
John, I would follow up politely to inquire why they decided against the amenity so you can learn about their onjections a bit more. Then watch Anthony's follow up video (https://community.vendingpreneurs.com/posts/module-5-pop-ins-sales-foundations-what-to-say-in-a-follow-up) to learn how to do follow ups with them every couple of months. Adding value in your follow up ¬†вА¶more

вЪ°пЄП

For a little more context, I feel like I have to offer fresh in my market because thereвАЩs so many competitors. I donвАЩt really like it. ItвАЩs a headache logistically. But although margins may be smaller, profit per unit is generally higher, so it kind of works out. If I only sell three sandwiches, but they each profit four bucks, thatвАЩs probably the equivalent to¬†вА¶more
